Order Custom Antique Store Banners for Shop Promotions & Grand Openings

Make the most of your antique store visibility with eye-catching vinyl banners designed for retail storefronts, events, and promotions. From grand openings and seasonal sales to antique shows and collector events, our professionally designed custom antique store banners help improve your business visibility and make an unforgettable first impression.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver an antique store banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made antique store banner.

We offer a wide selection of custom antique store banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for your antique store promotion.

Did we answer all your questions?
If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Antique Store Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Advertising

Your antique store banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of antique store banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your antique store banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular antique store banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for storefronts.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your antique store banner a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality for outdoor antique store displays.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor antique store displays and windy conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor antique store displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors for antique store windows, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces for antique store applications.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Finishing Options for Professional Antique Store Displays

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all antique store banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your antique store banner:

  • Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for antique store vinyl banners.
  • All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the antique store banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the antique store banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your antique store banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for antique store banners and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the antique store banner for outdoor use.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided antique store banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

We do not recommend wind slits in antique store banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Antique Store Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your antique store banner order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority

Timelines can be tight for antique store events. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express

Have an extra day, but still need your antique store banners quickly? The express option is ideal.

3 Business Days Standard

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for antique store banners. Free and speedy for most custom orders.

5 Business Days Saver

If you're not in a rush for your antique store banner, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Antique Store Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All antique store banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your antique store banner order is put into production.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your antique store banner order.

For more information on check orders for antique store banners, see this article on our blog.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Antique Store Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping your antique store banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your antique store banner order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your antique store banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large antique store banner orders.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for antique store banners:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

International Shipping Notes

For international shipments of antique store banners, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping for your antique store banner, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retail & Event Uses for Antique Store Banners

We print thousands of antique store banners each year. If you need inspiration for designing your antique store banner, explore some popular ways below for how our customers use vinyl banners for antique businesses.

Antique Store and Retail

  • Antique shop grand openings
  • Consignment store storefront advertising
  • Vintage collection seasonal sales
  • Estate sale promotions

Antique Events and Shows

  • Antique show booth backdrops
  • Collector event sponsor recognition banners
  • Vintage market displays
  • Estate auction announcements

Outdoor and Public Use

  • Antique festivals and fairs
  • Flea market vendor displays
  • Community vintage events
  • Historic district promotions

Business and Commercial

  • Antique appraisal service advertising
  • Vintage restoration shop branding
  • Collectible store "Now Open" banners
  • Antique dealer contact information
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Antique Store Banner Artwork Requirements for Printing

The file that prints best for antique store banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files for your antique store banner, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your antique store banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your antique store banner order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your antique store banner project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Professional Antique Store Banners Today

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color antique store banners take your business promotion to the next level. At Banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability for your antique store advertising needs.

Design your custom antique store banner with our easy-to-use online designer, upload your own artwork, or work with our professional design team to create the perfect banner for your antique shop, consignment store, or collector business.

Full color vinyl antique store banners are a low cost option for high quality advertising. Use a banner to advertise your antique store - they can help draw in tourists and local customers. Banners can be used indoors or outdoors for advertising sales and promotions. You can also let people know your business hours and contact information.

Get started on your custom antique store banner today and start attracting more customers to your antique business with professional vinyl banner advertising.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Antique Store Banners

What material is best for outdoor antique store banners?

For outdoor antique store displays, we recommend our 13 oz or 18 oz vinyl materials. The 18 oz material offers extra durability for long-term outdoor use, while mesh banners are ideal for windy conditions.

How long do antique store banners last outdoors?

Our vinyl antique store banners typically last 2-3 years outdoors when properly maintained. Factors like weather exposure, UV levels, and installation method can affect longevity.

Can I get my antique store banner in custom sizes?

Yes, we offer antique store banners in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50'. For larger sizes or unique dimensions, please contact us for a custom quote.

What's the best finishing option for antique store banners?

For most antique store applications, we recommend hems and grommets for easy hanging. For pole mounting, pole pockets work best. Reinforced options are available for high-wind areas.

Do you offer design services for antique store banners?

Yes, our professional graphic design team can create custom artwork for your antique store banner. We also offer templates and an online design tool if you prefer to create your own design.

How quickly can I get my antique store banner?

We offer production times from 1-5 business days, plus shipping time. Rush options are available if you need your antique store banner for an urgent event or promotion.
